title: Storms brewing across SA: No alerts for Garden Route or Karoo on 11 March
description: NATIONAL NEWS - In the latest weather update...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - In the latest weather update from the SA Weather Service, no weather warnings have been issued as yet for the Garden Route or Karoo on Tuesday 11 March.

Isolated to scattered showers & thundershowers are expected over the central & eastern parts of the country, with possible severe thunderstorms over the North West, Free State, Mpumalanga & KwaZulu-Natal.


> Maximum / minimum temperatures:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
